summary: Tested Bookings Jump In flow, Live Session Deal badge, Surfer role authorization, Photo Upload API, and Gamification UI components. Fixed critical bug: SURFER_ROLES array had mismatched role names causing 'Must be logged in' error for Pro Surfer users.

fixed_bugs.issue: SURFER_ROLES array had wrong role names ('Pro Surfer', 'Competitive Surfer') instead of Auth.js signup role IDs ('Pro', 'Comp Surfer')
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Changed SURFER_ROLES from ['Grom', 'Surfer', 'Competitive Surfer', 'Pro Surfer', 'Hobbyist', 'Grom Parent'] to ['Grom', 'Surfer', 'Comp Surfer', 'Pro', 'Hobbyist', 'Grom Parent']

bookings_jump_in.opens_drawer_overlay: PASS - URL stays at /bookings, UnifiedSpotDrawer opens as bottom sheet
bookings_jump_in.no_redirect: PASS - Jump In does not redirect to new page
bookings_jump_in.drawer_content: PASS - Shows Atlantic Beach, Live Session Savings!, Sarah Waters, Jump In button

live_session_deal_badge.badge_visible: PASS - Green 'Live Session Deal' badge displayed on Live Now tab
live_session_deal_badge.savings_calculation: PASS - Shows 'Save $5/photo!' badge (calculated from $10 gallery vs $5 live)

surfer_roles_authorization.pro_role_can_join: PASS (after fix) - 'Pro' role now correctly recognized as surfer-capable
surfer_roles_authorization.error_before_fix: 'Your current role (Pro) cannot join sessions. Switch to a surfer role.'
surfer_roles_authorization.SURFER_ROLES_synced: PASS - Now matches Auth.js signup role IDs

photo_upload_api.endpoint_exists: PASS - POST /api/photos/upload returns 422 without file (validates input)
photo_upload_api.upload_with_file: PASS - Successfully uploads PNG file with photographer_id
photo_upload_api.tagged_surfer_ids: PASS - Accepts JSON array of surfer IDs for tagging

gamification_ui_components.XPDisplay: PASS - Renders XP with Zap icon, supports sm/md/lg sizes
gamification_ui_components.BadgeIcon: PASS - Shows badge with tier indicator (bronze/silver/gold/platinum)
gamification_ui_components.BadgeRow: PASS - Displays up to maxDisplay badges with +N for overflow
gamification_ui_components.ProfileBadgeSection: PASS - Grid of badges with XP earned info
gamification_ui_components.SurferRatingBadge: PASS - Star rating with session count

photographer_sessions_dashboard.upload_photos_btn: PASS - Button has data-testid='upload-photos-btn', visible when isLive=true
photographer_sessions_dashboard.photo_upload_modal: PASS - PhotoUploadModal integrated with session pricing and participants

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Bookings.js SURFER_ROLES array was out of sync with Auth.js role IDs - this caused 'Must be logged in' error for Pro Surfer users
All Gamification UI components (XPDisplay, BadgeIcon, BadgeRow) are properly exported and follow consistent patterns
Photo Upload API correctly handles file upload with form data including tagged_surfer_ids JSON array
context_for_next_testing_agent: SURFER_ROLES in Bookings.js was fixed to match Auth.js role IDs. Jump In flow now opens UnifiedSpotDrawer as overlay (not redirect). Live Session Deal badge shows savings calculation. Photographer Sessions Dashboard has Upload Photos button when live. Photo Upload API at /api/photos/upload accepts multipart form with tagged_surfer_ids JSON.

test_flow_summary.bookings_page: /bookings → Tabs: Live Sessions, Find Buddies, Scheduled, Past, Live Now
test_flow_summary.live_now_tab: Shows live photographers with pricing, Live Session Deal badge
test_flow_summary.jump_in: Opens UnifiedSpotDrawer at bottom as overlay (z-[1000]), shows photographer details and Jump In button
